title: Healthcare Analytics Challenges: A Three-Pillar Framework Connecting Analytics Maturity, Workforce Agility, and Technical Enablement
description: Research repository for a Viewpoint paper proposing Human-in-the-Loop Knowledge Governance (HITL-KG), a socio-technical framework for mitigating institutional amnesia in healthcare analytics. Includes a Three-Pillar Assessment Rubric, validated query triple architecture, and a Python-based literature review tool implementing Clean Architecture for academic claim verification.
notes: Research repository for the Viewpoint paper proposing Human-in-the-Loop Knowledge Governance (HITL-KG) for mitigating institutional amnesia in healthcare analytics, under major revision at the Interactive Journal of Medical Research (i-JMR, ms#96541), together with the accompanying literature review toolset. The version and publication date for each release are derived automatically from the corresponding GitHub release tag.
